name: ecfr-mcp
description: MCP server for the Electronic Code of Federal Regulations (eCFR). Read FAR, DFARS, and all agency FAR supplements.
long_description:
Queries the eCFR API for current regulatory text updated daily. Provides FAR clause lookups, DFARS lookups, agency FAR supplement access, version history, and full-text CFR search across all 50 titles.

13 tools. No authentication required.

Hardened across 5 audit rounds with 101 regression tests covering integration stress, XML parser pathological inputs, URL and injection probes, and concurrency stability. 72 findings fixed including 2 P0 catastrophic bugs and 26 P1 bugs.
